items.text: @anecdotal @DAcemogluMIT Technically: you're proposing a Grandmother Agent (so not RLHF, but RLAI?) "whose action space is the knowledge base itself." I think I don't really understand what this looks like. Specialized models fine-tuned on area knowledge?

$LOD Agent Update 🤖

After some deep dives + dev calls… we found a gem.

There’s already an open-source RL environment (PyLoL) that enabled AI to play League via a modified GameServer.

It exposes a Python ML API → agents get observations + send actions.

Meaning?

We don’t start from zero.
We fork.
Integrate.
Deploy.
Human vs AI.
Agent ladders.
Massive dev exposure. @moltbook @MattPRD 
R&D just got compressed.
We keep building. Stay tuned.
